name: Request for Quotation
response:
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>Request for Quotation</title>

</head>

<body>

 <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;">

   <h2 style="color: #333333;">Request for Quotation</h2>

   <p>Dear {{ supplier_name }},</p>

   <p>We hope this email finds you well.</p>

   <table style="width:100%; border-collapse: collapse;">

     <thead>

       <tr style="background-color: #f2f2f2;">

         <th style="padding: 8px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">Item Name</th>

         <th style="padding: 8px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">Item Description</th>

         <th style="padding: 8px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">Quantity</th>

         <th style="padding: 8px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">UOM</th>

       </tr>

     </thead>

     <tbody>

       {% for item in items %}

       <tr>

         <td style="padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">{{ item.item_name }}</td>

         <td style="padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">{{ item.description }}</td>

         <td style="padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">{{ item.qty }}</td>

         <td style="padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">{{ item.uom }}</td>

       </tr>

       {% endfor %}

     </tbody>

   </table>

   <br>

   <p>Please provide your best and most competitive quotation for the above items. If there are any discounts or special terms available for bulk orders or long-term contracts, please specify those in your quotation.</p>

   <p>We would appreciate it if you could send your quotation to <a href="mailto:purchase@novaironsteel.com" style="color: #007bff; text-decoration: none;">purchase@novaironsteel.com</a> and no later than {{ schedule_date }}.</p>

   <p>You can also send your quotation by clicking on the following button:</p>

   {{ portal_link }}

   <br>

   

   <p>Best Regards,</p>

   {% set u = frappe.get_doc("User", owner) %} {{u.first_name}} {{ u.last_name }}<br>{{u.email}}

   <p>Nova Iron & Steel Limited</p>

   <br>

   

   <!-- Password Reset Button -->

   <p>Please click on the following button to set your new password:</p>

{{ update_password_link }}

 </div>

</body>

</html>
response_html:
Request for Quotation

Dear {{ supplier_name }},

We hope this email finds you well.

Please provide your best and most competitive quotation for the below listed items by clicking on the link.

{{ portal_link }}

{% for item in items %} {% endfor %}
Sr No Item Code Item Name Part_No Quantity UOM
{{ loop.index }} {{ item.item_code}} {{ item.item_name }} {% set item_doc = frappe.get_doc("Item", item.item_code) %} {{ item_doc.custom_excode or "" }} {{ item.qty }} {{ item.uom }}

Material Required Days:{{ custom_required_by_in_days | int }}

NOTE: - Due to system constraints, quotation submitted through other channels will not be considered

We would appreciate it if you could send your quotation within 5 working days.

General terms and conditions

If you are logging in for the first time, please click "Forgot Password" on the login page.

Best Regards,

{% set u = frappe.get_doc("User", owner) %} {% set emp = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", {"user_id": u.name}, ["designation"], as_dict=1) %}

{{ u.first_name }} {{u.last_name}}
{% if emp and emp.designation %} {{ emp.designation }}{% endif %}

Clevertech Packaging Automation Solutions Private Limited
subject: Request for Quotation
